message:
fix(frankenlab): include scenario_id in validation error messages

ScenarioRunnerError::Validation now carries the scenario_id field
so the error message reports which specific scenario failed
validation, rather than a generic 'Scenario validation failed'
that requires manual correlation when running multi-scenario
suites.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
